summary: Joel Spolsky announces the launch of Fog Creek Copilot 1.0, a product built entirely by summer interns as part of Project Aardvark. The post is a brief celebration of the shipping milestone, crediting the four interns who developed it over the summer.
key_points: Fog Creek Copilot 1.0 has officially launched
The product was built by summer interns (Ben, Tyler, Yaron, and Michael) as Project Aardvark
The project demonstrates Fog Creek's approach of giving interns real, shippable product responsibility
money_quotes: Fog Creek Copilot 1.0 just went live.
key_insight: Fog Creek trusted summer interns to build and ship a real commercial product, reflecting a culture of giving junior developers meaningful responsibility.
